It's the end of the week and there's everything to play for, but will the rising tensions stop Marty scooping the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: When a cold spell hits New York, Arthur moves into the room next to Doug and Carrie. However, he drives them to distraction and becomes a little too comfortable in his new surroundings. Family comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie repeatedly cheats to beat Deacon and Kelly at games, causing Arthur to reveal a traumatic story from her childhood

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Newcastle couple Mick and Dianne find a holiday home in and around Gran Alacant on Spain's Costa Blanca, showing them properties within their budget of £120,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Musician Donagh is taking the giant step of relocating to the vibrant Spanish city of Valencia. With best friend Aime coming along to help him look for a new forever home, he calls on the house-hunting skills of Scarlette Douglas to find him the perfect city pad. Donagh has a maximum budget of £125,000 and a long wishlist, so the pressure is on Scarlette to deliver

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Makeup artist Charlie brings in a Scandinavia table with two legs sawn off, while photographer Murray brings in an original printer's cabinet, complete with brass fonts

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: In this episode, filmed in 2019, Hollywood legend Susan Sarandon swaps the glamour of Hollywood for Southend Pier, as Jamie and Jimmy make Sicilian-inspired chicken thighs wrapped in smoky pancetta, inspired by the actress' Italian roots. Plus, the hosts are bubbling over with excitement as they get to make their very own English sparkling wine, and must leave the Capri behind when they sample the wares a little too enthusiastically

programme.title: Deadpool 2 (2018)
programme.desc: The wisecracking anti-hero meets Russell, a gifted youngster pursued by a heavily armed cyborg from the future. With the aid of fellow mutant Domino and five less lucky teammates, they attempt to defeat the villainous Cable. Action comedy, starring Ryan Reynolds, Josh Brolin, Julian Dennison and Zazie Beetz

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. This time, 28-year-old Michelle, a mother-of-two from Hampshire, and gym-loving Adam from Essex, who is 30, take part

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A patient is brought in having broken his leg playing American football, while a resident at a neurological hospital is examined for signs that he has suffered a stroke. A man experiencing dizzy spells is accompanied on a trip to St George's by his granddaughter, who shares her memories of how he filled a gap in her life after her father died

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: An aspiring paralympian goes on a date with a former footballer, while a double divorcee hopes to make it third time lucky, if her long list of very specific requirements do not hold her back. A car salesman ponders how to raise the subject of BDSM on his first date with a primary school teacher, and a previous visitor to the bar returns for a second try

programme.title: Sex in Lockdown: Keep Sh*gging and Carry On
programme.desc: A mix of faces from across the nation join Anna Richardson as she gets to grips with all things love, sex and romance, delving into the ways sex in Britain has altered since its people have been ordered to stay indoors. She also reveals the results of a specially commissioned survey to find out exactly what the Great British Public have been getting up to during lockdown

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets Tim, who plans to make a barn out of discarded windows and old driftwood, and novice builder Mandy, who is creating a retirement home in a minivan for her and her cat. Also, George and Will Hardie finally finish their Victorian-inspired observatory

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The fallout from the previous day's vote casts a shadow over the group, but Brendan does his best to cheer them up with some budget-busting activities

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Foodies from Brighton are left high and dry on the opening night of their cheese and wine bar, and there's an unwelcome infestation for glampsite owners in Portugal.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps a midwife and her father to find a holiday home in Menorcan resort Cala en Porter with a pool and space to set up a beauty salon, on a budget of £325,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ian Snowley and Kay Marriot fell in love with the volcanic landscapes and coasts of Lanzarote, and are now determined to buy a house that they can use to explore the island further. Scarlette Douglas shows the couple five properties, hoping to maximise their budget of £150,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from in and around Hastings and Rye in East Sussex, where the first host is 52-year-old nursery owner Louise, who plans a fun-filled evening of Thai food. Her guests are horse-mad Emily, who's 40, 56-year-old Caribbean takeaway owner Clive, 23-year-old beauty therapist Chiara and mature student and self-confessed foodie Gary. A power cut threatens to scupper Louise's night before it's even started, until her husband - and farmer - Roddy and his generator come to the rescue. Will the night impress the guests, and particularly the self-appointed Thai food expert at the table?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second night from Hastings and Rye in East Sussex sees host Emily plan an evening of comfort food, including carrot and parsnip soup, meat loaf and apple and blackberry crumble

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Australian mature student Gary hosts the third dinner party from Hastings and Rye, East Sussex, planning an evening filled with fun, flash and fabulous flavour

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former 1960s pop star Dec hosts the next dinner party from Hastings and Rye, East Sussex, planning to impress his guests with musical surprises and a simple seaside menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Hastings and Rye, East Sussex, beauty therapist Chiara returns to her roots to throw an Italian dinner party. However, Irish crooner Dec gets on his host's wrong side when he questions her interest in healing crystals and likens her to a page three glamour girl

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie reminisces about meeting Doug, recalling how she was originally paired off with Richie, while he was with her friend Lynn. Donny Osmond guest stars, with Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie make new friends, but a scheduling error means they have to choose between going out with some old pals or their new acquaintances

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. Their relationship is so fractured that they're failing to save their father's Italian restaurant Levanti's from being overwhelmed by local competition, and the situation has become so desperate that their dad is in danger of losing his life savings

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman goes house hunting on Spain's Costa Blanca with Barnsley couple Paul and Lisa, who cannot wait to buy their first property together in the ever-popular resort of Torrevieja. They have three children and seven grandchildren wanting to visit, so the pressure is on Jasmine to find a holiday home the whole family can enjoy. With a £72,000 budget, she shows them five options - but will any measure up to their expectations?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Army reserve nurse Denise from Wigan and her friend Karen enlist the help of Jonnie Irwin to find Denise's perfect holiday home in and around Guardamar del Segura on the Spanish Costa Blanca. Jonnie shows the pair five properties for the budget of £95,000, hoping at least one will be to their liking

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Agricultural officer Christie brings in an iron bath rescued from a dilapidated Scottish estate, and later, window cleaner Karen arrives with a vintage linen press

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Home pottery enthusiasts gather in Stoke-on-Trent to take part in a 35-day throwing contest that will determine which of them should be named Top Potter

programme.title: Billionaire Cruise Ship: Paradise Island
programme.desc: A look at the day-to-day life on the private island of Ocean Cay - an exclusive, luxurious tropical paradise in the Bahamas. The island is owned by the giant cruise liner company, MSC Cruises, and three times a week a ship carrying over 5,000 expectant holidaymakers arrives, who demand the very best service and facilities

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Harriet Kemsley take on Jon Richardson and Joe Lycett in the words-and-numbers game, while Mat Ewins joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows an ambitious build in Cornwall, as Leigh and Richard transform a derelict 17th century flour mill into a contemporary, three-bedroom home. They employ traditional craftsmen to start work on restoring the exterior, but it's not long before the true scale of the damage to the structure is revealed, and as the costs rise, they are forced to take more of the work themselves

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In Newquay, surfer Katy Beddoe is preparing to jump back into competitions after a knee injury, while Cornish horseman David Jones and his daughter Myrtle ready their heavy horses for an old-fashioned ploughing contest. In Ilfracombe in north Devon, harbourmaster Georgina Carlo-Paat takes delivery of a new robotic waterborne litter picker

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A patient is brought in having broken his leg playing American football, while a resident at a neurological hospital is examined for signs that he has suffered a stroke. A man experiencing dizzy spells is accompanied on a trip to St George's by his granddaughter, who shares her memories of how he filled a gap in her life after her father died

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team return for an eleventh series. In the first episode, a tiny Jackahuahua puppy is in need of emergency spinal surgery after being attacked by a dog in the park, but it is not certain that he will be able to get back on his feet again after the operation. Elsewhere, a Bernese has a rare cyst in his elbow, requiring a challenging operation for removal, and an excitable Labrador requires elbow replacement surgery, which will result in a long and difficult road to recovery

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: An overweight bulldog needs an operation on his knees, but first Noel and the team must fix his breathing defect - a a common problem with flat face breeds. Elsewhere, a pug requires risky emergency spinal surgery to remove a cyst, and a rescue dog with hip dysplasia may have to be let go while under anaesthetic

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit this week, the group head to Edburton in West Sussex, and Tottington Manor, where owners Debra and Jamie Tombs claim to offer the 'Manor House' experience

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: As the remaining tourists adjust to the dramatic events of the last few days, three new couples arrive to shake things up, while one makes a dramatic announcement

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Glampsite owners in Portugal face the reality of living off-grid, and at a horse riding centre in France, cameras follow a mother and daughter with grand plans

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Newcastle couple Mick and Dianne find a holiday home in and around Gran Alacant on Spain's Costa Blanca, showing them properties within their budget of £120,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Amanda and Adam Cropper have been visiting Phuket in Thailand on holiday for some time and love it so much they decided to get married on the island. Now they're looking for their very own property there, initially to use as a holiday home before they move out full-time in the next few years. Jonnie Irwin guides them through the local market and shows them five properties for their £160,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Windsor, Berkshire, the first to host is estate agent Vikki who's hoping to bag the £1000 prize by hosting a ladies day-themed dinner party. The guests she's hoping to impress are entrepreneur and self-proclaimed winner Mohinder, local radio DJ Mary, 66-year-old football-loving Angie and second-hand car dealer Robert. With some gamey golfers, difficult diners and cutting commentary, it promises to be a night her guests won't forget in a hurry

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night in Windsor, and radio DJ Mary hosts an evening featuring traditional Irish dishes like vegetable soup, steak with champ, and an Eton Mess with a twist

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week in Windsor is outspoken entrepreneur Mohinder, who hopes to impress his fellow guests with an ambitious menu featuring tulips and a cauliflower foam

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Day four in Windsor is hosted by retired sales manager Angie, who is planning some 1960s fun. However, her guests are not impressed by the rules she lays down at the beginning

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night of the competition in Windsor, Berkshire, car salesman Rob unleashes the mother of all surprises on his guests, welcoming them to his enormous country mansion complete with swimming pool and Ferrari. Estate agent Vicky and radio DJ Mary are smitten by Rob and his house, but for entrepreneur Mohinder it's all too much as he's completely upstaged and realises he is no longer leader of the pack

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: After being bombarded with subtle hints, Carrie throws a surprise party to celebrate Arthur's 75th birthday, roping in a reluctant Doug to take the old man out for the day. However, when the pair visit Arthur's favourite restaurant for lunch, he slopes off

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon try their luck on the gaming tables in Atlantic City, telling Carrie a white lie to ensure there is no trouble at home - but their night proves far from profitable. Kevin James and Victor Williams star

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sam's Mediterranean Kabob Room in Monrovia, California, and within minutes of his arrival, is caught in the crossfire of an argument between the owner, his wife and their children, all of whom are feeling the pressure of working seven days a week. Can the chef save the business and mend the warring family's frayed relationships?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lisa and daughter Jordan are searching for their dream holiday home around the beautiful inland villages of Andalucía. They particularly love the town of Velez-Malaga, so Jonnie Irwin lines up five properties in the area for their budget of £75,000. They have set their sights on a traditional Spanish property with a modern twist, so will Jonnie be able to deliver?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sonia and Andrew are selling their home in the UK and are ready to make the permanent move to inland Almería in Spain to enjoy semi-retirement in the sun. Sonia is keen to set up her own Indian food business, so she needs a large kitchen, and Andrew wants the home to be ultra-modern in design. Laura Hamilton sets out to find five properties within their £145,000 budget that satisfy both their demands

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: A combination of Money for Nothing and The Repair Shop, in which people bring in their old items to be brought back to life. But there's a twist. The experts pitch for the chance to complete the job - then take a share of any profit when the restored relic is sold. Today's items are an unusual paraffin stove, a set of dilapidated farmhouse drawers and a battered travel chest

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In Newquay, surfer Katy Beddoe is preparing to jump back into competitions after a knee injury, while Cornish horseman David Jones and his daughter Myrtle ready their heavy horses for an old-fashioned ploughing contest. programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down

In the spot test, a guest judge, flower-making expert Rita Floyd, sets a floral challenge, but who will be named potter of the week, and who will leave the pottery? Presented by Siobhan McSweeney

programme.title: Secret Safari: Into the Wild
programme.desc: A zebra foal is threatened by a leopard that has stolen into the herd's enclosure, while a teenage rhino reluctant to leave his mother is encouraged by rangers to find a mate. A hyena cub who is the runt of his litter is used to coming last when food is divided up between his siblings - until he happens upon a dead antelope

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the game show mash-up, with Rachel Riley and Susie Dent. Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe take on Sean Lock and Richard Ayoade. Nick Helm joins Susie in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer returns to Cullercoats on North Tyneside to catch up with Mark and Suze, who were unable to agree on what to do with their four-bed Victorian town house. When Kirstie and Phil first met the couple nine months earlier, emotional ties to their home had left them in limbo, with Suzie feeling like she was unable to leave, but Mark longed to move into a bigger home with a better layout for their family. Now, Phil returns to find out if they followed through with their decision

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows an ambitious build in Cornwall, as Leigh and Richard transform a derelict 17th century flour mill into a contemporary, three-bedroom home. programme.desc: James Richardson, Eddie Hall and Michelle Ackerley present action from the fifth and concluding heat of the showpiece strongman event, held in Bradenton, Florida. Four-time champion Brian Shaw of America was among the five competitors aiming to win one of two available spots in the final. With commentary by Colin Bryce and Danny Wallace

programme.title: World's Strongest Man 2019
programme.desc: James Richardson, Eddie Hall and Michelle Ackerley present action from the final of the showpiece strongman event, held in Bradenton, Florida, as the 10 qualifiers from the five heats competed for the prize won by Iceland's Hafthor Bjornsson in 2018. The Icelandic Game of Thrones star was joined on the podium by Poland's Mateusz Kieliszkowski and America's Brian Shaw. With commentary by Colin Bryce and Danny Wallace

programme.title: UK's Strongest Man 2020
programme.desc: Action from the annual contest won by Scotland's Paul Benton last year, as strongmen undertake various gruelling challenges

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The housing team in Harrow accompany the police on a raid after receiving reports of dangerous conditions at a home belonging to a notorious slumlord's brother. Lettings agent John wants to turn a former Blackpool hotel into bedsits, but a routine check on the property reveals not only a severely neglected house, but also a drugs den littered with paraphernalia and some of the worst conditions he has ever witnessed

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Featuring two quarrelling neighbours who record each other's every moment on CCTV and in diaries. Their dispute began when Thomas parked his caravan on a quiet cul-de-sac, much to the annoyance of his neighbour Mrs Potter. Plus, how a shared driveway pushed Susie to breaking point when her neighbour Grant put her young daughter at risk. Susie decided to install gates across the drive and use it for family barbecues, but Grant took matters into his own hands and it ended in a trip to the police station for him

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Iain head to Manchester to recover one of the largest debts they have ever chased - more than £400,000 - owed to a builder after he was failed to receive payment for his work on a house. Meanwhile, officers Gary and Cona are in Kent to chase over £11,000 owed by a couple for unpaid rent

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An evasive man in west London is given a choice between paying up or relinquishing his luxury car, there's a writ for the organiser of a music festival, an aggressive rent defaulter needs evicting, and an entire hole family is angered in Hertfordshire when the agents call to collect a loan owed to a woman's ex-partner

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve in East London try to recover over £7,000 owed by a restaurant owner for an unpaid gas bill, while officers Gareth and Mitch in Gloucestershire seek just under £3,000 from the owner of a car wash. Stewart and Vic are in Manchester trying to recover nearly £5,000 owed by a blinds and shutters supplier to a dissatisfied customer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Mitch are on the trail of £2,500 in unpaid parking tickets in Cardiff, and while the debtor is not at home, they notice his car is sporting false number plates and call the police. The duo also face an angry defendant in Swindon when trying to collect £2,000 for unpaid rent on a lock-up, while in Buckinghamshire, Matt and Garry consider seizing a haul of luxury watches to pay more than £16,000 owed to a landlord

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Faced with insurmountable debt and a dangerous individual, Hendrix gets ready to meet his fate. Toadie realises that the world of online dating is far harsher than he expected

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mackenzie sells her car to pay off the drug debt, despite Ari's objections. Justin has a rough week with his legs and snaps at Leah, so John decides to intervene

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: A father-of-three who is severely in debt has to decide whether to accept a job offer that could help him clear what he owes, or whether he would be better off staying on benefits. A debt-laden aspiring rapper hopes that a chance meeting with a music manager will be his ticket to fame and fortune. A single mother who had her benefits slashed for not declaring her nightclub singer income faces eviction if she doesn't pay her rent arrears

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: Documentary examining some of Britain's most notorious murders, charting the last few days leading up to the killing from the perspectives of both perpetrator and victim. The programme uses dramatic reconstruction to pinpoint the trigger that set each one in motion, providing in-depth psychological analysis and scrutiny of the devious and calculating plans the killers formulated

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and criminology experts analyse the personality of Patrick Mackay, who confessed to murdering 11 people in London and Kent in the mid-1970s. His victims included a Catholic priest, bludgeoned to death with an axe

programme.title: Selling Sex to Survive
programme.desc: Documentary following the lives of people who have been driven to prostitution by poverty, as well as the organisations dedicated to helping them to turn their lives around, including volunteers like former sex worker Sonia, who now uses her past experiences to help others in similar circumstances

programme.title: Snatch (2000)
programme.desc: An unlicensed boxing promoter and his dim-witted sidekick convince an Irish gypsy to step in for their injured fighter, but find themselves drawn into a match-fixing racket. Meanwhile, the loot from a diamond heist goes missing, leading to a bloody conflict between Russian gangsters and a Jewish mob. Guy Ritchie's comedy drama, with Jason Statham, Brad Pitt, Benicio Del Toro and Stephen Graham

programme.desc: Action from heat one of the annual event, held this year in Bradenton, Florida. Great Britain's Luke Richardson battled it out with Americans Jerry Pritchett and Robert Oberst in events including the farmers walk and deadlift

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A man living in Cumbria takes issue with his neighbour's habit of letting his menagerie of chickens, cockerels, parrots and other birds freely wander along a residential road, and is even more disturbed by the fact that some of his fellow residents don't seem to have a problem with it. A former urban couple who moved to a rural valley in north Wales to breed horses enter open conflict with the owners of a nearby yurt business, whose fireworks parties spooked one of their prized beasts, resulting in an injury. Finally, a Romanian woman finds herself subject to abuse when she tries to set up a new home with her daughter in Wigan

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on two residential disputes that escalated from complaints about noise-making to far more serious quarrels. Warren and Sharee detail how their peaceful lives in a quiet Birmingham suburb were ruined when new neighbour Harry moved in. Harry complained of noise the pair knew wasn't coming from their household, an accusation he would level more than once, and with increasing intensity. Finally, when the hostile Harry pulled out a gun and threatened the couple over their garden fence, they were forced to sell up and move out. However, even after relocating, it seemed their nightmare was not over. Also featured is the story of Jill, who was just a teenager when Barry, who lived with his parents next-door, became fixated on her family making a racket. Brushing off the grievance, Jill and her relatives tried to get on with their lives, but one autumn day the feud took a tragic, life-changing turn

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve in East London try to recover over £7,000 owed by a restaurant owner for an unpaid gas bill, while officers Gareth and Mitch in Gloucestershire seek just under £3,000 from the owner of a car wash. Stewart and Vic are in Manchester trying to recover nearly £5,000 owed by a blinds and shutters supplier to a dissatisfied customer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor set out to evict a tenant from a property in Manchester but when the man claims he knew nothing about the court order tempers begin to fray. A car salesman in Cumbria is not happy about paying £4,500 to a dissatisfied customer, and in Shropshire a pub licensee claims she is unable to pay the rent she owes to her ex-landlord. With emotions running high, can she cut a new deal?

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor are in Manchester to recover £4,000 owed to a firm of architects, only for the debtor to attempt to throw them off the scent. Stewart is joined by Vic in Liverpool to track down a landlord who owes his former tenants deposits totalling £5,000, while Gareth and Mitch are in for a surprise when they chase a builder in Wiltshire

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

The duo also chase £5,000 for an unpaid parking fine, which comes as a shock to the debtor, who has clearly hit hard times

programme.title: Sinkholes: Buried Underground
programme.desc: As the pipes, tunnels and waterways that lie beneath the world's cities start to crumble, sinkholes are appearing with no warning. Footage from instances around the world reveal how once-stable urban areas are sinking right in front of people's eyes

programme.title: Rogue Earth: When Mother Nature Takes Revenge
programme.desc: Using video captured on smartphones and other devices, this programme recounts the Super Outbreak of 2011, when 362 tornadoes ripped across 21 American states. The story is told by heroes, survivors and victims in Alabama, where 252 fatalities and millions of dollars in property damage occurred

programme.title: Geostorm (2017)
programme.desc: After an unprecedented series of natural disasters threaten the future of the planet, an intricate network of satellites is created to control the global climate and keep everyone safe. However, when those satellites start to attack the Earth, it's a race against time for its creator to uncover the real threat before a worldwide storm wipes out everything and everyone. Sci-fi thriller, starring Gerard Butler, Jim Sturgess and Abbie Cornish

programme.desc: Action from heat three of the annual event, held this year in Bradenton, Florida. programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on two residential disputes that escalated from complaints about noise-making to far more serious quarrels. Warren and Sharee detail how their peaceful lives in a quiet Birmingham suburb were ruined when new neighbour Harry moved in. Harry complained of noise the pair knew wasn't coming from their household, an accusation he would level more than once, and with increasing intensity. Finally, when the hostile Harry pulled out a gun and threatened the couple over their garden fence, they were forced to sell up and move out. However, even after relocating, it seemed their nightmare was not over. Also featured is the story of Jill, who was just a teenager when Barry, who lived with his parents next-door, became fixated on her family making a racket. Brushing off the grievance, Jill and her relatives tried to get on with their lives, but one autumn day the feud took a tragic, life-changing turn

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The series investigating residential disputes continues, turning attention to feuds that turned violent. Among the stories highlighted are that of former paratrooper Rod who was attacked outside his own home by a knife-wielding neighbour, and 71-year-old Michael, a Suffolk villager whose fellow residents claim he has systematically harassed them, culminating in an assault in which he punched one of his neighbours repeatedly - an incident that was caught on camera. The programme also considers the devastating consequences when personal altercations end up escalating into neighbourhood wars, revealing how a conflict between the Webbs and the Browns in transformed their street in Devon into a war-zone

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor are in Manchester to recover £4,000 owed to a firm of architects, only for the debtor to attempt to throw them off the scent. Stewart is joined by Vic in Liverpool to track down a landlord who owes his former tenants deposits totalling £5,000, while Gareth and Mitch are in for a surprise when they chase a builder in Wiltshire

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. The pair also head down to the south coast of England, seeking more than £3,500 owed for an unpaid loan

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry are in Wolverhampton, where a woman who owes £2,000 in parking fines denies knowing the debtor - despite being a relative. But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gary and Paul visit Kent to recover £2,500 owed by a publican to a utilities supplier - only to find themselves in the middle of a family at war. Stewart and Elmor deal with a sensitive case in Liverpool, as they repossess a property where the tenant has failed to pay any rent for almost a year

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Noticing how happy Shane is with Amy, Dipi decides to keep her heartbreak to herself and allow him a joyful new relationship. Bea secretly assembles the billy cart for Levi

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Internet entrepreneur Martin and his partner in grime Glenn hear about a huge fly-tipping operation blighting a remote Hampshire beauty spot, and raise a small army of volunteers who roll up their sleeves to sort it themselves. Meanwhile, the UK's network of motorways and A-roads rely upon a system of lay-bys to help keep drivers safe, but these safe pull-in zones also attract an unsightly collection of filthy behaviour, and it falls to Huntingdon lay-by warriors Clive and Steve to take on the speeding traffic, atrocious weather, drunk drivers - and those people who confuse lay-bys with lavatories

programme.title: A&E After Dark

Doctors are concerned that his behaviour could be as a result of a serious head injury. Doctor Andrew administers morphine to help a woman in agony, but the medics grow worried when her screams turn to silence

programme.desc: Conclusion of a three-part story. The investigation into a movie studio boss's murder becomes further complicated when fresh evidence points to yet another suspect. Meanwhile, the ex-husband of the deceased goes to trial to face accusations of having a hand in the crime - is an innocent man about to be convicted? Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Bernard and Lupo investigate the suspected hit-and-run death of the mistress of the CEO of a failed investment bank. The evidence leads the pair to a kidnapping and extortion plot that uncovers several potential suspects, including a disgruntled client

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates when a journalist is found murdered, but the case presents new evidence for an old crime involving a man serving a life sentence for spying for the Chinese government. Keith Carradine guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis discover a man leading a secret double life when they investigate who opened fire on a group of people disembarking from a party cruise. A major dispute erupts when Schiff confronts the governor and attorney general over the decision to seek the death penalty. Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pizza delivery man is murdered, causing trouble when the two suspects point the finger at the other. Though one of the pair is taped admitting to the crime, his Catholic priest uncle forbids the team from violating the sanctity of the Confessional. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard struggle to establish a motive when a woman who adopted 10 children with learning difficulties is murdered. The duo question her husband, who discovered the body, before turning their attention to the youngsters - until information about an affair and the offer of a reality TV appearance sheds light on the case

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the death of fashion company owner Sid Maxwell, and question their initial conclusion of asphyxia when they meet photographer Terry Clark. The duo discover a suspicious website after learning Maxwell was using a fake identity

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An undercover police office is killed by McGee while on duty, and Jenny approves an investigation into the death. But the decision places a strain on her relationship with Gibbs as the team tries to prove that the agent was not culpable, despite the evidence building against him. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A model dies while filming a reality TV show at a US Marine base, and an autopsy reveals she was killed by a drug overdose administered by someone else. Inquiries lead the team to identify three possible suspects - but one of them is also murdered. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Lauren Holly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva disappear while searching for smuggled weapons at a shipyard. Gibbs is soon on the case and learns the pair were looking for a freight container thought to hold explosives from Iraq. McGee tries to get a GPS trace on the missing duo's mobiles, leaving the others struggling to find them before they come to serious harm. Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames' investigation into the disappearance of a book-keeper leads back to the death of her brother, a hitman, two years previously. The evidence seems to point to an imprisoned mobster - until a second body is discovered and the case becomes less clear-cut. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The trial of pimp Bart Ganzel begins. Meanwhile, Detective Cassidy is accused of raping a woman while undercover, resulting in a court appearance of his own. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A sports reporter seeks Benson's help to accuse a cameraman of rape, but only agrees to press charges after she discovers the man is stalking her. Before the trial begins the team finds out she is pregnant, and ADA Barba must contend with questionable defence tactics as a result

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A baby's abduction from a playground leads to a twisted case of lies, betrayal and infidelity. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Reports of sexual abuse surface at an elite private school, prompting Detective Benson and ADA Barba to confront a powerful administrator to expose decades of secrets. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Bull

programme.title: Bull

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the brutal murder of a TV reporter who had been alleging that a billionaire Wall Street investment adviser was a fraud. Evidence of love triangles and hedge fund fraud soon comes to the fore. Crime drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when an illegal immigrant is attacked, and the incident is connected to a spate of hate crimes against Hispanic men. The prosecution of some teenagers for the crime proves to be a thorny and delicate issue for the District Attorney's office

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Investigations into a stolen credit card lead Briscoe and Curtis to a pair of teenage lovers who may have killed their newborn son and disposed of the body. The couple strenuously deny any wrongdoing - but the discovery of a decomposing baby's finger adds weight to the evidence against them. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to prosecute a pilot accused of murdering her married lover for trying to end their relationship, but finds himself battling the Navy and the office of the Judge Advocate General, who seem intent on obstructing his efforts. Acclaimed American detective drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy woman is found dead in her apartment, but Lupo and Bernard are quick to dismiss the theory that the killer sought her money. Evidence suggests she was mixing with dangerous figures, among them a cartel, after suitcases filled with cash and drugs are found in the victim's portfolio of properties

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The famous chef of a trendy New York City restaurant has accused of sexual assault by three employees but never been arrested - until now. When waitress Kayla Morgan realises that she was sexually assaulted in a taxi after an after-hours VIP party, charges are pressed against the chef, though Benson and Stone hit an immovable obstacle when they try to prosecute the case

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A commander who knows the location of a shipment of nuclear fuel rods is abducted, and the team is called in to try to identify the kidnapper. However, as the investigation turns up new evidence, it appears someone might have had a very different motive for silencing the officer. Guest starring Zac Efron

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The wives of two marines are murdered, and although Gibbs initially suspects they were victims of domestic violence, subsequent developments suggest the case may involve professional killers who already have their next victim in mind. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team raids an illegal motor business run by US navy officers and find a marine's severed head in the boot of a car. Tony succeeds in tracking down the owner of the stolen vehicle with the help of McGee's hacking skills, while Abby tries to discover the identity of the dead man. Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette star

programme.title: The Murders
programme.desc: The gruesome death of a cinema expert threatens to expose a government informant. Investigative drama, starring Jessica Lucas

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU detectives investigate after a school nurse notices multiple injuries on a young girl. It soon becomes clear that they must stop a clinically psychopathic boy with homicidal tendencies. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A local college student is sexually assaulted, and the SVU detectives utilise every strategy they have to uncover a massive conspiracy involving the university's leading administrators. Rollins and Benson visit the victim at a psychiatric hospital, where she is undergoing electroshock therapy to erase the memories of her attack

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man goes on a killing spree, leaving Benson and the team to detain a prostitute who is part of his social circle. As the detectives work with her to track down their quarry, they find themselves drawn into her world and must fight to save her life. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU's holiday celebrations are disrupted when Detective Tutuola's ex-brother-in-law is arrested for a brutal attack of a priest just before Christmas. He protests his innocence despite a significant criminal record, and appeals to the force to find evidence that exonerates him. In the process, a buried church scandal begins to unravel. Starring Ice-T, Olivia Benson and Nick Amaro

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The team members fear that they're in over their heads when they take on the seemingly unwinnable case of Elliott Miles, a mute man facing the death penalty if he's found guilty of murder and arson. Elsewhere, Bull is stunned to learn that his ex-wife is remarrying

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Jason's team is rocked when client Elliott Miles is found guilty of murder, and they must regroup as the trial enters the penalty phase in order to prevent him from being sentenced to death. But when new evidence emerges that could prove Elliott's innocence, Bull must find a way to present it in court without being found in contempt. Meanwhile, Marissa faces hard truths about her relationship with Bull

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett and Castle investigate when a body is found in the theatre staging Martha's latest show, leading them into the unexpectedly dangerous world of competitive a cappella

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A carjacking turns nasty when an off-duty police officer is killed and the driver is kidnapped. Luckily, Briscoe and Curtis capture one of the perpetrators, who offers to reveal the whereabouts of the missing driver to DA Ross - in exchange for immunity on the cop-killing charge. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murders of a firefighter and his wife. The case leads to one of the dead man's colleagues, whom the detectives suspect resorted to extreme measures to cover up the crime - but prosecutors at the district attorney's office discover that taking the suspect to court could have serious political repercussions

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murders of two scientists found stabbed to death following a fire. The evidence points to a mentally disturbed woman, but Cutter and Rubirosa suspect she may have been manipulated by someone else

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a seemingly random drive-by shooting, but soon suspect the victim's husband may know more than he is letting on. To make matters worse, the hospital in which the victim was pronounced dead appears to have contributed to her demise - putting a highly respected surgeon's reputation on the line. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis trace a robbery suspect to a militia group, but McCoy is strangely affected by the leader's devotion to his cause - and begins to receive death threats once the case comes to court. Award-winning police drama, starring Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A key witness in a murder trial is found dead outside her hotel room, and Lupo and Bernard's investigation embroils them in a conspiracy involving black-market dealings, drug cartels and corrupt officials. With the lives of other witnesses in danger, Rubirosa finds herself caught in the crossfire

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An elderly man is declared a neighbourhood hero after he shoots three people in an armed raid on his store. However, Lupo and Bernard soon begin to suspect that there is more to this incident than meets the eye, fearing it could have been a scare tactic for a shakedown. Elliott Gould guest stars, with Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team suspects a desperate US Marine may have faked his own death with the help of a friend and blown up an ambulance in a botched attempt to cover all traces of the subterfuge. Subsequent developments, including a mysterious disappearance, seem to confirm the hypothesis - until a timely discovery by Abby throws new light on the case

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents are called to a national forest where several women have gone missing and conclude there may be a serial killer at large - a theory confirmed in gruesome fashion as the investigation proceeds. Drama, with Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to a high school on a marine base, where a pupil has taken his classmates hostage and is threatening to detonate a bomb strapped to his chest. Gibbs manages to enter the classroom in an attempt to dissuade the boy, but soon realises someone else may be controlling his actions. Drama, with Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU investigates a 'he-said, she-said' case when a woman crashes a wedding to accuse her therapist of sexual assault. Hard-hitting and emotional drama, directed by Lucy Liu and starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Two surprise sniper attacks on the NYPD leave the SVU squad scrambling for answers. When the link between the shootings appears to be Detective Tutuola, he reconnects with his former Narcotics partner to uncover a possible motive tied to their old cases. As the violence continues, Lieutenant Eames joins the investigation and the unit races to hunt down a killer no one saw coming

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A comatose woman is found clinging to life in a rowboat after an assault on the East River near the mayor's home. The victim's condition leads to a complex investigation reconstructing her recent activities, and the detectives' findings uncover some surprising results. Richard Thomas (The Waltons) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Two ambitious district attorneys clash over a murder case, and Benson is sure the prosecuting county has wrongly accused a rape victim of killing her ex-boyfriend. New evidence and a different suspect are put forward, but the Suffolk County DA will not drop her case. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team is tasked to track down a man who is picking up and then attacking closet gay married men. After a suspect is apprehended, his attorney manages to muddy the waters regarding the legitimacy of the arrest. Mariska Hargitay and Raul Esparza star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A janitor violently attacks a school coach, but the SVU team uncovers mitigating circumstances, connecting his behaviour to a history of sexual abuse. They identify more victims of the same predator, including a prisoner Reggie Rhodes (Mike Tyson) on death row. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Jason represents a teenager arrested for robbing a jewellery store with an older man, arguing that she was a victim of his abuse and not his willing accomplice

programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. The pair discover they share a dislike of being fixed up, so depart together to prevent Helen objecting to them leaving. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Leslie Ash and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: The chef enjoys a champagne afternoon tea, before she discovers the secret behind delicious fish and chips

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash deals with the Nazis latest secret weapon, while Salt disobeys orders one time too many

programme.title: Saturday Night Out (1963)
programme.desc: Five sailors spend their overnight leave in London, where they get involved with a variety of unusual characters. Drama, starring Bernard Lee, Heather Sears and John Bonney

programme.title: They Made Me a Fugitive (1947)
programme.desc: Soho black marketeers frame a former RAF pilot for murder, forcing him to go on the run until he can exact revenge on them. Thriller, starring Trevor Howard, Sally Gray and Griffith Jones

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: The chef enjoys a champagne afternoon tea, before she discovers the secret behind delicious fish and chips

programme.title: No Bass Like Home
programme.desc: Highlights from Brent 2020's No Bass Like Home Festival celebrating reggae culture. Featuring live music sets and the musical, cultural and social history of reggae in and around Harlesden

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: For the first time in its long history, the famously discreet luxury hotel in Mayfair, central London, opens its doors to documentary cameras, with director Jane Treays spending a year behind the scenes following staff and guests. The Melchors from California arrive for their annual two-week stay, rekindling their relationship with personal butler Michael Lynch, while energetic general manager Thomas Kochs travels to New York to drum up new business from leading US travel agents

programme.title: The Knowledge: The World's Toughest Taxi Test
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the test that all black cab drivers working in the city of London must take, one of the world's toughest exams - The Knowledge of London. Each candidate must memorise the capital's 25,000 streets, traffic restrictions and ever-changing points of interest, which takes an average of four years of determination to successfully pass

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: A small-time hoodlum inadvertently becomes a celebrity after stealing a taxi. With Keith Allen, Jennifer Saunders and Robbie Coltrane

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: National Treasure
programme.desc: Marie encounters with one of her husband's accusers, and is left shaken by a difficult interview with his barrister. Both experiences leave her questioning whether it was love, or denial, that allowed her to remain loyal to Paul for so long - despite his many affairs. Meanwhile, Gerry manages to dig up some evidence that seems to thoroughly discredit one of Paul's key accusers. However, making use of this new knowledge will mean Paul has to make an uncomfortable decision. Legal drama, starring Robbie Coltrane, Julie Walters and Kerry Fox

programme.title: Summerfield (1977)
programme.desc: A teacher arrives in a small coastal community to take over as teacher of the local school. As he investigates the mystery of his predecessor's sudden disappearance, he uncovers a connection with a girl who lives on a nearby island who has a rare blood disorder - and the long-buried secrets of the community. Drama, starring Nick Tate and John Waters

programme.title: Dying of the Light (2014)
programme.desc: A CIA agent is diagnosed with a degenerative condition that results in him being forced to retire from the world of intelligence. When he receives word that a terrorist who once tortured him has resurfaced, he goes rogue and sets out to assassinate the man while he is still able. Thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, Anton Yelchin and Irene Jacob

programme.title: This That and the Other (1970)
programme.desc: Anthology of three comic tales. A fading movie star tries to seduce a producer, a suicidal loner is snapped out of his misery by a hippy, and a taxi driver suffers a blow to the head that leaves him experiencing erotic hallucinations. Comedy, starring Victor Spinetti, Dennis Waterman, Vanda Hudson and John Bird

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Bertie and Zigby set off to see the baby turtles hatching on Savannah Beach, but McMee keeps falling asleep, making their journey very difficult

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Nils realises that the flock is being followed by an elf and manages to surprise and catch her

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Underwater World for Kids
programme.desc: An underwater adventure that takes in the many natural wonders and magical sea creatures above and below our oceans

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen and Phil are keen to know how things went between unlikely lovebirds Laura and Mike, so both end up invited to lunch - where they relate conflicting stories. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Exploring assumptions about the origins of American popular music, including the belief that drums were brought to the USA by enslaved people from the coastal regions of Africa. The programme travels to Austria, Texas and the edge of the Sahara desert to uncover the real story behind the theories

programme.title: The Knowledge: The World's Toughest Taxi Test
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the test that all black cab drivers working in the city of London must take, one of the world's toughest exams - The Knowledge of London. Each candidate must memorise the capital's 25,000 streets, traffic restrictions and ever-changing points of interest, which takes an average of four years of determination to successfully pass

programme.title: Strongroom (1962)
programme.desc: Two people are locked in a bank vault during a robbery, but the crooks have a crisis of conscience and try to free them while avoiding the police. Crime drama, with Colin Gordon

programme.title: The Gay Dog (1954)
programme.desc: The owner of a racing greyhound loses faith in his dog's ability to win when he encounters a faster animal. However, his friends are determined to prove him wrong. Comedy, starring Wilfred Pickles, Petula Clark and Megs Jenkins

programme.title: Moby Dick (1956)
programme.desc: Obsessive skipper Captain Ahab leads his ship and crew on an epic quest to find and kill the legendary white whale that bit off his leg - but his lust for vengeance endangers all their lives. John Huston's seafaring adventure, based on Herman Melville's novel, starring Gregory Peck, Richard Baseheart, Orson Welles and Leo Genn

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring Camden and Sydenham for locals and tourists.

programme.title: The Bionic Vet
programme.desc: A woman with a seven-month-old puppy faces a difficult decision when Noel Fitzpatrick reveals he must perform a risky operation to treat the young dog's bone deformities. Two animals injured in road accidents are rushed into the surgery and a Labrador puts its newly transplanted hip to the test when it is reunited with its owner

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Abbey Wood, Ladywell. Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Sail the Saronic and Ionian Greek islands with Peter Maneas as he explores their rich history, culture, cuisine, and people as well as their hidden secrets and surprises

programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: Roy visits Amber's therapist to help raise his spirits, and ends up revealing fantasies about his neighbour Sally, whom the counsellor then meets at a dinner party, where a mutual attraction quickly develops, urging Tom and Roy to take desperate measures to keep them apart. Comedy, starring Clive Swift and Roger Lloyd Pack

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Michael Caine buys a birthday present for Mrs Huggett. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Rude Boy (1980)
programme.desc: A fan of new wave punks The Clash follows his musical heroes on tour, but slowly finds himself disagreeing with their ideals. Ray Gange stars in this semi-documentary view of street politics in the 1980s, including concert footage of the band

programme.title: Killer Weekend (2018)
programme.desc: Sam is thrilled about the thought of going on a zombie-themed stag do with his mates. However, it takes a disastrous turn on the first day, leaving the unlucky party pals holed up in a nuclear bunker. Director Ben Kent's comedy horror, starring Mark Heap, Sean Verey and Danny Kirrane

programme.title: Kevcoin: The Movie (2018)
programme.desc: Wannabe music producer Kevin Powder hatches a scheme to get rich by creating his own cryptocurrency, with each token valued at a trillion dollars. But to make his plan a reality, he needs to hit the streets in search of investors. Spoof documentary, starring Jason Attar and Dominic Geraghty

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Notting Hill for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: The Chase

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Extended highlights of the First Test at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane, as the 2013 three-match series got under way. The tourists had already played here against Queensland Reds and will have been aware of the need to start strongly against the injury-hit Wallabies. Lions coach Warren Gatland has a strong squad to select from and was looking to begin in the same fashion as the 2001 vintage, who won in Brisbane in the opening Test of that tour

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the Second Test at the Etihad Stadium in Melbourne, as the Lions aimed to clinch the 2013 series after winning a thrilling First Test 23-21. The Lions suffered their heaviest defeat on this ground during the 2001 tour, as the Aussies overturned a half-time deficit to run away 35-14 victors. With just one Test remaining, the result here will determine whether there is anything riding on next Saturday's final showdown

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the third and final Test at the ANZ Stadium in Sydney, as the 2013 tour reached its conclusion. The opening two Tests were both decided by the narrowest of margins - the Lions prevailed 23-21 in the opener in Brisbane, as Australia missed a chance to win the match with the final kick of the game, before the Wallabies earned revenge by triumphing 16-15 in Melbourne, with the visitors failing to score from a last-gasp penalty attempt on that occasio

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty
